subcodes.first_line: O Hádí! We have verily revealed unto thee divers Tablets wherein We acquainted thee with that which thy Lord, the All-Knowing, hath willed in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هادی قد نزلنا لک الواحا شتی و عرفناک فیها ما اراد ربک العلام فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
